scope: Follow-up S4096 layer-2 tile-size sweep for the rocWMMA persistent-tile compressed dKV ScatterAdd probe.
why_this_artifact_exists: The first persistent-tile result passed S128/S512 but failed S4096 at 32x256 and 32x512. This sweep checks whether smaller producer tiles recover enough parallelism to make the same LDS grouped-accumulator body worth pursuing.

gate_context.read: A promotable S4096 compressed-dKV accumulator must beat the retained sparse-atomic wall before integration, and should trend toward the materialized MFMA floors without their multi-GiB selected-state footprint.

read.primary_observation: S4096 runtime is nearly flat around 130-136 ms while modeled write reduction changes from 2.0x to 23.8x. That means this body is not dominated by final global writes; it is dominated by the persistent CTA producer/local-table schedule itself.
read.what_this_closes: Do not spend more time retuning seq_chunk or selected_block for this one-CTA persistent local table design. It already fails by about 14.8x versus the 8.8 ms sparse-atomic wall at its best point.
read.why_s512_was_misleading: S512 has only 32,640 valid pairs and 128 compressed groups, so the local table and serialized producer loop stay small. S4096 has 1,572,352 valid pairs and 1024 compressed groups; the same CTA design loses enough parallelism that write coalescing cannot compensate.

next_branch.name: parallel_producer_compact_grouped_partials
next_branch.required_change: Split K16xD16 producer work across many CTAs/waves, then reduce compact grouped partial rows separately. The reduction must be over a bounded touched-group format, not the earlier dense [seq_tile, group, D] or full selected-partial slabs.
candidate_contract: Producer CTA: small token microtile x selected microtile x D16, MFMA-shaped contribution math, writes compact rows keyed by compressed group.
Reducer CTA: merge compact rows for the same (seq_tile or global group, D16) using segmented or hash reduction.
Production path: fuse probability/LI/compressor recompute so materialized probs/grad_logits are removed after the accumulator schedule is proven.
reject_if: S512 producer+reducer fails to beat the 1.51 ms persistent-tile positive rung.
S4096 compact partial traffic pushes timing above the 8.8 ms sparse-atomic wall.
The compact format degenerates into dense multi-GiB partial slabs or scalar group-major recompute.
